visionPinCapReached.en: You can pin up to 3 dreams — unpin one to make room.
visionPinCapReached.desc: Snackbar shown when the user tries to pin a vision item but already has the maximum of 3 pinned.

visionMarkedAchievedToast.desc: Snackbar confirming a vision/dream item was marked as achieved.

visionUnpinTooltip.desc: Tooltip on the pin icon button when the vision item is currently pinned; tapping unpins it.

visionPinTooltip.desc: Tooltip on the pin icon button when the vision item is not pinned; tapping pins it to the home screen.

visionMoveToActiveTooltip.desc: Tooltip on the achieved-toggle icon button when the vision item is achieved; tapping returns it to active goals.

visionMarkAchievedTooltip.desc: Tooltip on the achieved-toggle icon button to mark the vision item as achieved.

visionEditTooltip.desc: Tooltip on the edit icon button for a vision item.

visionAchievedBanner.desc: Banner text shown at the top of an achieved vision item when no achieved date is recorded.

visionAchievedOnDate.desc: Banner text on an achieved vision item showing the date it was achieved.

visionDaysPastTarget.desc: Chip label for a vision item whose target date has passed; {count} is the number of days past the target.

visionTargetToday.desc: Chip label shown when a vision item's target date is today.

visionDaysToGo.en: {count, plural, =1{1 day to go} other{{count} days to go}}
visionDaysToGo.desc: Chip label counting down the days remaining until a vision item's target date.

visionPinnedChip.desc: Chip label indicating a vision item is pinned to the home screen.

visionAffirmationLabel.desc: Section heading above the affirmation text on the vision detail screen.

visionMilestonesLabel.desc: Section heading for the milestone checklist on a vision item.

visionMilestonesComplete.desc: Progress subtitle showing how many milestones are completed out of the total.

visionWhyItMattersHeading.desc: Heading for the 'why it matters' prose card on the vision detail screen.

visionNotesHeading.desc: Heading for the description/notes prose card on the vision detail screen.
